name: Pork Chops in Radish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Season the pork chops with salt and pepper on both sides.
3. Add the pork chops to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
4. Remove the pork chops from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add diced tomatoes and hot cooked rice.
6. Stir to combine and simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
7. Return the pork chops to the skillet and serve immediately.
